verbGlossary.COST CODED TO: {source} assigned to a CSI or custom {target} for tracking labor, material, and equipment spend
verbGlossary.BUDGETED IN: {source} has a planned dollar allocation in {target} before work begins
verbGlossary.COMMITTED AGAINST: {source}covers installation of this element with committed dollars locked to it
verbGlossary.PURCHASED VIA: Equipment or material for this element procured through a purchase order {target}
verbGlossary.CHANGE ORDERED: {target} created to capture added, deleted, or modified scope for this element
verbGlossary.PRICED IN: {source} scope change broken into {target} with labor, material, and markup detail
verbGlossary.BACK CHARGED: Rework or deficiency on this element charged back to the responsible subcontractor via CCO
verbGlossary.BILLED TO OWNER VIA: {source} passed through to the owner via a prime contract {target}
verbGlossary.INVOICED FOR: {source}submits {target} request for completed work on this element
verbGlossary.PAY APP DRAWN FOR: {source} included in the GC pay application to the owner
verbGlossary.RETAINAGE HELD ON: {source}of earned value on this element withheld until substantial completion
verbGlossary.DIRECT COSTED: {source}cost recorded directly against this element without a subcontract
verbGlossary.EXPENSED ON: Individual expense transaction such as rental, material, or labor posted to this element's {target}
verbGlossary.BUDGET MODIFIED FOR: {target} reallocated to or from this element via a formal budget modification
verbGlossary.WBS CODED TO: {source} mapped to a work breakdown structure code linking scope, schedule, and cost
verbGlossary.BUDGET CODED TO: {source} tagged with {target} for roll-up reporting and variance analysis
verbGlossary.SOV LINE ITEM FOR: {source} appears as a line in {target} for progress billing
verbGlossary.ALLOWANCE CARRIED FOR: {source}carries an allowance for this element when final selection is pending
verbGlossary.CONTINGENCY RESERVED FOR: {target} dollars reserved to cover unknown risk on this element
verbGlossary.FORECASTED IN: Projected final cost for this element carried in {target} at completion
verbGlossary.VARIANCE MEASURED ON: {target} vs actual variance calculated for this element's cost code or WBS
verbGlossary.COST GROWTH TRACKED ON: {target} and scope creep growth percentage monitored on this element
verbGlossary.CHANGE RATE MEASURED ON: {source}of {target} dollars to original contract value measured for this element
verbGlossary.LIEN WAIVED FOR: {source}releases lien rights upon {target} for this element's work
verbGlossary.PAYMENT RELEASED FOR: GC releases {target} to subcontractor after invoice approval and retainage calculation for this element
verbGlossary.COMMITTED COST TRACKED ON: Total committed dollars including original plus approved changes monitored against {target} for this element
verbGlossary.CASH FLOW PROJECTED FOR: {source}forecasted based on this element's installation schedule
verbGlossary.POTENTIAL CHANGE ON: {source} identified and priced but not yet approved as {target} change order
verbGlossary.COMMITTED LINE ITEM FOR: Individual line within a subcontract or PO that covers this specific element's scope and price
verbGlossary.CCO LINE PRICED FOR: {target} change order broken into a line item detailing cost impact on this element
verbGlossary.FUNDED BY: {source}'s total installed cost allocated within the overall project {target} envelope
verbGlossary.CONTINGENCY BURNED BY: {source} changes consumed {target} dollars reducing the remaining reserve
verbGlossary.CPI MEASURED ON: Cost performance index calculated as earned value divided by actual cost tracked for this element's work
verbGlossary.EAC VARIANCE TRACKED ON: Difference between {target} and estimate at completion monitored for this element
verbGlossary.CASH FLOW DEVIATION ON: {source}projected cash flow variance measured for this element
verbGlossary.INVOICE LAG TRACKED ON: Days from {target} submission to payment measured for this element's subcontractor billing
